summary: Tested Distribution module tabs (Stock In, Stock Out, Settlements, Billing) for emerald-themed modern design. All 4 tabs have been successfully updated with the required styling: uppercase headers with IBM Plex Sans font, emerald-50/40 alternate row colors, emerald-50/60 hover states, clickable rows that navigate to detail views, and proper data-testid attributes.

issues: Console warnings about Recharts chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - not blocking but should be addressed
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 tabs correctly implement emerald theme with: bg-emerald-50/30 header background, text-emerald-800/70 header text, uppercase tracking-wider text-xs font-semibold headers
IBM Plex Sans font applied via inline style on all table headers
Hover states using hover:bg-emerald-50/60 with transition-colors duration-200
Clickable rows with cursor-pointer and onClick handlers
SettlementsTab has collapsible account cards with emerald gradient styling and shadow effects
BillingTab has proper Debit/Credit Notes table with emerald styling

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 4 tabs verified with correct emerald styling

seed_data_creation: Used existing distributor 'Brian' (DIST-0003) with shipments, deliveries, settlements, and billing notes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Distribution module tabs have been redesigned with emerald theme. Navigation: Login -> Select 'Distribution' from module dropdown -> Click 'Distributors' -> Click on 'Brian' -> Test tabs (Stock In, Stock Out, Settlements, Billing). All tabs have uppercase headers, alternate row colors, hover states, and clickable rows.

design_verification.pagination: VERIFIED - Present in DeliveriesTab and SettlementsTab
